pi_items.source: Downloaded and inspected official Chinook database from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database/raw/master/ChinookDatabase/DataSources/Chinook_Sqlite.sqlite; ran: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customer;
Verified in Chinook database schema via: sqlite3 .schema Customer; all columns present in Customer table
Verified in Chinook database schema via: sqlite3 .schema Customer; all columns present in Customer table
Queried Chinook database: SELECT FirstName, LastName FROM Customer WHERE CustomerId=1; result: Luís|Gonçalves
Queried Chinook database: SELECT Email FROM Customer WHERE CustomerId=1; result: luisg@embraer.com.br

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the official Chinook sample database, a real public dataset available on GitHub (lerocha/chinook-database). The Customer table contains exactly 59 rows. The metadata correctly identifies the columns to be moved (Address, City, State, Country, PostalCode, Phone, Fax, Email) and retained (CustomerId, FirstName, LastName, Company, SupportRepId) based on the actual database schema. Sample verification: Customer ID 1 is Luís Gonçalves with email luisg@embraer.com.br, as claimed in the verifier script.
